pub mod client;

pub use client::{AgentCommand, AgentCommandError, AtpEvent};

pub mod config_init;
pub mod llm;

pub mod scheduler;

pub use scheduler::{CronError, CronJob, CronScheduler, MissedRunPolicy};

use thiserror::Error;

#[derive(Debug, Error)]
pub enum AvixError {
    #[error("invalid PID: {0}")]
    InvalidPid(String),

    #[error("invalid IPC address: {0}")]
    InvalidIpcAddr(String),

    #[error("invalid tool name '{name}': {reason}")]
    InvalidToolName { name: String, reason: String },

    #[error("unknown credential type: {0}")]
    UnknownCredentialType(String),

    #[error("config parse error: {0}")]
    ConfigParse(String),

    #[error("capability denied: {0}")]
    CapabilityDenied(String),
}

pub mod service;

pub use service::{ExecError, ExecResult, ExecService};

pub mod approval_token;

pub use approval_token::ApprovalTokenStore;

pub mod bridge;

pub use bridge::{McpBridge, McpToolDescriptor};

use crate::types::Pid;
use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum ProcessKind {
    Agent,
    Service,
    Kernel,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Serialize, Deserialize)]
#[serde(rename_all = "snake_case")]
pub enum ProcessStatus {
    Running,
    Paused,
    Waiting,
    Stopped,
    Crashed,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct ProcessEntry {
    pub pid: Pid,
    pub name: String,
    pub kind: ProcessKind,
    pub status: ProcessStatus,
    pub parent: Option<Pid>,
    pub spawned_by_user: String,
}
